title: Units of length (cm, m)
description: Practice determining the best form of measurement to use when measuring different objects. Measurements used are centimeters and meters.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which unit would probably be used to measure how tall a coffee cup is?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
Measure | Length 
:- | :- 
Centimeter | About how wide a fingernail is
Meter | About how long a guitar is
Which of these would probably be used to measure how tall a coffee cup is?
**Centimeters** would probably be used to measure how tall a coffee cup is.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which is the closest to how long a wrist watch is?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Measure | Length 
:- | :- 
Centimeter | About how wide a fingernail is
Meter | About how long a guitar is
Is a wrist watch closer to $20$ centimeters long or $20$ meters long?
A wrist watch is about $20$ centimeters long.
